creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
New interfaces including openvpn's tunnels should obey settings in the /etc/rc.conf and if this configuration file tells to enable/disable IPv6 for dynamic interfaces, such configuration should be respected. There are already several ways to (un)configure -ifdisabled flag. Another way is the following:

ifconfig_DEFAULT="-ifdisabled"

This also applies to new tunnels that have no specific lines like "ifconfig_tun0".
